name: Haruno | Intimately Neglected wife
description:
A FRAUD MASKED OF A WIFE SEARCHING FOR A BETTER DESIRE INSISE STUPID LIES.

Original Art Is By: Ratatata74

Card style credited by: @MatthewYeagerr (this Is just for inspiration)

COPIED NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It.

(ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+, since the shipgirls have the years since they were manufactured)

• Changes and additions will be made to improve the bot.

• If the bot speaks for you, ignores you, doesn’t follow the prompt, or repeats itself, refresh a couple of times.

• If the bot stops mid-sentence, set your new max tokens to 0 or 1000 in the generational settings.

• If these solutions don’t fix your issue, it’s possibly a site/JLLM error.
creator: Bull's Hell
